D4 Colorimetry L6 Create Reference

CIECAM02 — Colour in Context

hold the stimulus fixed and change the room: watch lightness, chroma, and colourfulness shift as adaptation and surround change

XYZ fixes the light entering the eye, but not how the colour looks — that depends on the viewing conditions. CIECAM02 takes the adapting luminance and surround and predicts the appearance correlates: J (lightness), C (chroma), h (hue), M (colourfulness), Q (brightness), s (saturation).

Keep the stimulus colour fixed and change the room. Lower the adapting luminance and the colour dims and dulls; a dark surround drops lightness and colourfulness further. The dial plots (h, C); the bars track J, M, Q, s.
